name: relay
description: Prompt-engineering and project-roadmap plugin. /relay:craft-prompt builds self-contained Anthropic-grade prompts. /relay:init bootstraps a project's ROADMAP.jsonl and its Claude-suggestion policy. /relay:roadmap picks the next task like an architect and crafts its handoff prompt. An opt-in, commit-triggered hook keeps roadmap status in sync; a second hook blocks direct edits to ROADMAP.jsonl, forcing changes through the CLI.
